zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Wingfield於1377年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆時，他的父親John Wingfield32歲，母親Margaret Hastings22歲。他於1400年與Elizabeth Russell在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年5月3日在他的家鄉享年32歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Wingfield于1377年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆时，他的父亲John Wingfield32岁，母亲Margaret Hastings22岁。他于1400年与Elizabeth Russell在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1409年5月3日在他的家乡享年32岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Wingfield was born in 1377, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wingfield, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Hastings, was 22. He married Elizabeth Russell in 1400, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 May 1409, in his hometown, at the age of 32, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Wingfield est né en 1377, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wingfield, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hastings, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Russell en 1400, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1409, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Wingfield 1377 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wingfield 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Hastings 22. Er hat 1400 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Mai 1409 im Alter von 32 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wingfield è nato il nel 1377 nel Letheringham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Wingfield, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Hastings, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Russell nel 1400, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 maggio 1409, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wingfieldが1377年にイギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで生まれた時，父John Wingfieldは32歳，母Margaret Hastingsは22歳であった。1400年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでElizabeth Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1409年5月3日に故郷で32歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Wingfield(이)가 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wingfield(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Hastings(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 5월 3일 그의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wingfield nasceu em 1377, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wingfield, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hastings, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Russell em 1400, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1409, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Wingfield родился в 1377 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wingfield было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hastings, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Russell в 1400 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 мая 1409 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Wingfield nació en 1377, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wingfield, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Hastings, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Russell en 1400, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1409, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
